metadata.publisher: Office of the Registrar General & Census Commissioner, India (ORGI)
metadata.note: India's own sample-registration estimates of vital rates, released May 2026. Crude death rate is not age-adjusted; the 2021 spike reflects COVID-19, with 2022-2024 showing the recovery. Each series carries its own year (or period) array because the trend tables span different ranges. 2018 values for crude death rate and infant mortality are carried forward from SRS 2023 (overlap years match exactly); the SRS 2024 trend tables themselves begin at 2019.
metadata.label: Infant mortality rate
